title: 'Bigger, brighter and lighter': It was love at first use with the 3rd-generation Amazon Kindle Scribe (2025), but its height and price make it unwieldy
summary: I can't praise Amazon's 3rd-generation Kindle Scribe enough — it's the best note-taking Kindle yet. I've used the 2024 release of the Kindle Scribe (2nd generation) for two years and I've loved every minute of it.
caption: output/2026-07-24/bigger-brighter-and-lighter-it-was-love-at-first-use-with-the-3rd-gene.txt
